data.name: Cycle 2 and Later Day 1 Visit Window
Cycle 2 and Later Day 8 Visit Window
Minimum Interval Between C1D1 and C1D4 Priming Doses
Minimum Interval Between C1D4 and C1D8 (First Full Dose)
BMA After CR Achievement - 6 Month Assessment
BMA After CR Achievement - 12 Month Assessment

Redosing Criteria - ANC
data.description: Absolute neutrophil count requirement for redosing at start of new cycle

data.name: Redosing Criteria - Platelet Count
data.description: Platelet count requirement for redosing at start of new cycle
data.text: Platelet count ≥25 × 10^9/L

data.name: Redosing Criteria - Nonhematologic Toxicity Recovery
data.description: Recovery requirement for nonhematologic toxicities before redosing
data.text: Recovery of treatment-related nonhematologic toxicities to baseline or Grade ≤1 severity

data.name: Redosing Criteria - No Ongoing CRS or ICANS
data.description: No ongoing CRS or ICANS of any grade on any dosing day
data.text: For any dosing day (at start of a cycle or during a cycle), no ongoing CRS or ICANS (any grade)

data.name: Redosing Criteria - Peripheral Neuropathy Recovery
data.description: Peripheral neuropathy recovery requirement before redosing
data.text: Recovery of treatment-emergent peripheral neuropathy to Grade <1 severity

data.name: QW to Q2W Dose Interval Change Criteria
data.description: Criteria for transitioning from weekly to every-2-week dosing
data.text: Participant has received QW dosing for at least 6 cycles and has achieved an IMWG response category of PR or better persisting for at least 2 months

data.name: Priming Dose Completion Requirement
data.description: Both priming doses must be received before full dose
data.text: Participants must receive both elranatamab priming doses (12 mg C1D1 and 32 mg C1D4) before receiving the planned full dose (76 mg)

data.name: Treatment Continuation Criteria
data.description: Conditions under which participant may continue receiving study intervention
data.text: Each participant may receive study intervention until confirmed disease progression, unacceptable toxicity, withdrawal of consent, or study termination

data.name: Imaging at Suspected CR/sCR Condition
data.description: Imaging required at suspected CR/sCR if not performed within prior 6 weeks
data.text: Imaging required at suspected CR/sCR if not performed within the prior 6 weeks

data.name: Post-Discontinuation Disease Assessment Continuation
data.description: Conditions for continuing disease assessments after treatment discontinuation without confirmed PD
data.text: For participants who discontinue study intervention without confirmed PD: perform at EOT visit, then at least Q4W (±1 wk) until confirmed PD, withdrawal of consent, initiation of subsequent anticancer therapy, participant lost to follow-up, death or defined end of study

data.name: C1D4 Dose Escalation Criteria
data.description: Criteria for escalating from priming dose to full dose
data.text: The dose of elranatamab should be increased to 32 mg on C1D4 and to 76 mg on C1D8 as long as the participant meets the redosing criteria. If a participant does not meet these criteria on C1D4 and C1D8, dosing should be deferred until the criteria are met.

data.name: Dose Reduction Applicability
data.description: Dose reductions only applicable after first full planned dose
data.text: Dose reductions are only applicable after the first full planned dose (76 mg) is administered

data.name: Screening to Treatment Transition
data.text: Participant must meet all eligibility criteria and be registered with IRT. Screening window is Day -28 to Day -1.

data.name: QW to Q2W Dosing Transition
data.text: If participant has received QW dosing for at least 6 cycles and has achieved a PR or better persisting for ≥2 months, the dose interval will be changed from QW to Q2W (eg, beginning C7D1)

data.name: Priming Dose Step-Up (C1D1 to C1D4)
data.text: Two step-up priming doses: 12 mg on C1D1 then 32 mg on C1D4, with minimum of 2 days between doses. Dose increase contingent on meeting redosing criteria.

data.name: Priming Dose Step-Up (C1D4 to C1D8 Full Dose)
data.text: 32 mg on C1D4 followed by 76 mg starting on C1D8, with minimum of 3 days between C1D4 dose and first full dose. Dose increase contingent on meeting redosing criteria.

data.name: Discontinuation for Confirmed Disease Progression
data.text: Participant discontinues study intervention upon confirmed disease progression per IMWG criteria

data.name: Discontinuation for Unacceptable Toxicity
data.text: Participant discontinues study intervention due to unacceptable toxicity

data.name: Treatment to End of Treatment Transition
data.text: End of Treatment visit to occur within 14 days post-final dose

data.name: End of Treatment to Follow-Up Transition
data.text: Follow-up visit 28 to 35 days post-final dose

data.name: Follow-Up to Long-Term Follow-Up Transition
data.text: Long-term follow-up visits every 12 weeks (±14 days)

data.name: Dose Deferral for Not Meeting Redosing Criteria
data.text: If a participant does not meet redosing criteria on C1D4 and C1D8, dosing should be deferred until the criteria are met

data.name: C1D4 Dose Delay and Re-treatment
data.text: If the C1D4 dose (32 mg) cannot be administered within the protocol-defined window, elranatamab treatment may resume at the planned C1D4 dose (32 mg) upon meeting the re-treatment criteria. Upon re-treatment, if the C1D4 dose (32 mg) was tolerable, the elranatamab dose should be increased to the planned full dose (76 mg) approximately 4 days later.

data.name: Discontinuation for Pregnancy
data.text: If a participant is confirmed to be pregnant, study intervention should be discontinued

data.name: Early Termination - Confirmed Disease Progression
data.description: Participant discontinues study intervention upon confirmed disease progression per IMWG criteria

data.name: Early Termination - Unacceptable Toxicity
data.description: Participant discontinues study intervention due to unacceptable toxicity

data.name: Early Termination - Withdrawal of Consent
data.description: Participant withdraws consent at any time

data.name: Early Termination - Study Termination by Sponsor
data.description: Sponsor terminates the study

data.name: Early Termination - Lack of Efficacy
data.description: Participant discontinues due to lack of efficacy

data.name: Lost to Follow-Up
data.description: Participant is lost to follow-up

data.name: Study Completion
data.description: Completion of all protocol-required visits including long-term follow-up

data.name: Post-Discontinuation Assessment Exit - Confirmed PD
data.description: For participants who discontinue without confirmed PD: disease assessments continue until confirmed PD, withdrawal of consent, initiation of subsequent anticancer therapy, participant lost to follow-up, death, or defined end of study

data.name: Early Termination - Death
data.description: Participant death

data.name: Early Termination - Pregnancy
data.description: Confirmed pregnancy requires discontinuation of study intervention

data.name: C1D4 Dose Escalation Decision
data.description: Decision to escalate from 12 mg priming dose to 32 mg priming dose on C1D4 based on redosing criteria

data.name: C1D8 Full Dose Escalation Decision
data.description: Decision to escalate from 32 mg priming dose to 76 mg full dose on C1D8 based on redosing criteria

data.name: New Cycle Redosing Decision
data.description: Decision to re-treat at the start of any new cycle based on all redosing criteria being met

data.name: QW to Q2W Dosing Frequency Decision
data.description: Decision to change dose interval from QW to Q2W after at least 6 cycles of QW dosing with PR or better persisting for ≥2 months (eg, beginning C7D1)

data.name: Disease Response Assessment Decision
data.description: Decision point for disease response assessment conducted on a 28-day (±1 wk) interval, determining continuation, confirmation of PD, or treatment discontinuation

data.name: BMA for CR Confirmation Decision
data.description: Decision to perform BMA at suspected CR and subsequent follow-up at 6 months, 12 months, and yearly after achieving CR. If all CR criteria met except BM plasma cells, additional BMA every 3 months.

data.name: C1D4 Delayed Dose Re-treatment Decision
data.description: If C1D4 dose cannot be administered within protocol-defined window, decision to resume at 32 mg upon meeting re-treatment criteria, then escalate to 76 mg approximately 4 days later if tolerable
